question: Give the name of the nearest city to Chicago.
sql: SELECT City.city_name FROM City JOIN Direct_distance ON City.city_code = Direct_distance.city1_code WHERE City.city_name = 'Chicago' ORDER BY distance LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找与芝加哥最近的另一个城市名称

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL描述准确地反映了原始问题的意图，即查找与芝加哥最近的另一个城市名称。
